Bug / Task Description: The `merge` map builtin (builtinMerge, pkg/stdlib/maps.go) resolves conflicting keys with the wrong precedence: when both maps contain the same key, the value from the first map wins instead of the value from the second (last-writer-wins). The set of resulting keys and the overall length are correct; only the values of keys present in both maps are wrong.
Commit Subject: fix(stdlib): correct precedence in map merge
